Package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.convention

package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.convention
Convention-endpoints mixin pack — composable @Rest(mixins=...) resources that ship the "internet conventions" surface (favicon, robots, sitemap, version, well-known) every public-facing service eventually grows.

Four sibling mixins compose into the host @Rest-annotated resource. Each mixin owns its default mount paths and is independently mountable; the four together drop in as a pack via @Rest(mixins={FaviconMixin.class, SeoMixin.class, VersionMixin.class, WellKnownMixin.class}).

  • FaviconMixin — /favicon.ico with a 30-day Cache-Control and a default Juneau-branded icon on the framework classpath.
  • SeoMixin — /robots.txt (deny-all by default) and /sitemap.xml (empty <urlset> by default); both builder-driven.
  • VersionMixin — /version, /info, and /about returning the same JSON metadata map; defaults read MANIFEST.MF + git.properties from the classpath.
  • WellKnownMixin — /.well-known/security.txt per RFC 9116; 404 unless explicitly configured.
Composition example:

@Rest( path="/api", mixins={ FaviconMixin.class, SeoMixin.class, VersionMixin.class, WellKnownMixin.class } ) public class ApiResource extends RestServlet { @Bean SeoMixin seo() { return SeoMixin.create().robotsAllow("*", "/").build(); } @Bean WellKnownMixin wellKnown() { return WellKnownMixin.create() .securityTxt("Contact: security@example.com\nExpires: 2027-01-01T00:00:00Z\n") .build(); } }

All four endpoints are excluded from generated Swagger / OpenAPI specs via @OpSwagger(ignore=true) — convention endpoints are not API-meaningful.

See Also:
  • REST Server — Composition (mixins, paths)
Since:
10.0.0
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.apache.juneau.rest.server
    REST Server API
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    FaviconMixin
    Mixin that serves a favicon.ico icon at /favicon.ico.
    FaviconMixin.Builder
    Builder for FaviconMixin instances.
    FaviconProvider
    Flavor-neutral favicon worker bean shared by the favicon @Rest flavors.
    FaviconProvider.Builder
    Builder for FaviconProvider instances.
    FaviconResource
    Child-resource flavor of the FaviconMixin mixin.
    FaviconServlet
    Standalone servlet companion of the FaviconMixin mixin.
    SeoMixin
    Mixin that serves SEO-conventional endpoints /robots.txt and /sitemap.xml.
    SeoMixin.Builder
    Builder for SeoMixin instances.
    SeoMixin.SitemapEntry
    Single sitemap entry (immutable).
    VersionMixin
    Mixin that serves deployment-introspection metadata at /version (configurable).
    VersionMixin.Builder
    Builder for VersionMixin instances.
    VersionProvider
    Flavor-neutral version/build-metadata worker bean shared by the version @Rest flavors.
    VersionProvider.Builder
    Builder for VersionProvider instances.
    VersionResource
    Child-resource flavor of the VersionMixin version/build-metadata capability.
    VersionServlet
    Standalone servlet companion of the VersionMixin mixin.
    WellKnownMixin
    Mixin that serves RFC 8615 /.well-known/* discovery endpoints.
    WellKnownMixin.Builder
    Builder for WellKnownMixin instances.
